criteria.name: Full test suite passes
criteria.evidence: 11 test failures across 4 files. test_validation.py: 8 failures (tests call compare_station_data(str,df,df) but function expects (df,df,on,value_cols)). test_repo_shape.py: 1 failure (requirements.lock not in ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES). test_pipeline_execution.py: 3 failures (daily CSV artifacts missing 'rows' field, imputation_report not typed in manifest). test_data_refresh.py: 2 NEW failures from broken imports in 9251ada.

failing_nodes.message: All TestCompareStationData tests call compare_station_data('greenwich', df, df) with wrong 3-arg pattern. Function signature at validation.py:14 is compare_station_data(ref_df, cmp_df, on=, value_cols=). Tests use old validate_against_reference call pattern. Fix: change to compare_station_data(stanhope_daily, greenwich_daily).
TestValidateAgainstReference.test_delegates_to_compare also calls compare_station_data with wrong 3-arg pattern (str, df, df). Same root cause.
ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES set does not include 'requirements.lock'. File exists at repo root.
Daily CSV manifest entries missing 'rows' field. test_pipeline_execution.py:169 expects 'rows' in every artifact with 'station' key.
imputation_report not tracked as typed artifact in manifest. Only 'processed_csv' and 'qa_qc_report' types exist.
NEW FAILURE: ImportError: cannot import 'load_station_files' from normalized_loader. Broken by Ralph's fix 9251ada.
NEW FAILURE: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'src'. Test uses __import__('src.pea_met_network.manifest'). Broken by 9251ada.

summary: Phase 7 E2E validation: REJECT. AC-E2E-7 now PASS (pseudo-station fix works). AC-E2E-8 still FAIL with 11 test failures across 4 files. 3 previously identified failing nodes remain unfixed. Ralph introduced 2 NEW failures via broken imports in 9251ada. Total: 5 distinct failing nodes (7 root causes). Next Ralph run should: (1) fix test_validation.py call signatures, (2) add requirements.lock to ALLOWED_ROOT_FILES, (3) add rows field to daily manifest entries and imputation_report type, (4) revert broken import changes in test_data_refresh.py.
